LEASING OF VEHICLES

Our company is a collective of amazing people striving to build delightful services.

Our main objective is to help organizations to minimize costs and safeguard operational expenditures.  Main target is mobilization of resources and electronic systems for organizations.  This is done by identifying options for the organization and suggesting recommendations for change and, helping with additional resources to implement business solutions.

Read More

CORPORATE CLIENTELE

OUR TEAM

The team has vast experience and expertise providing travel solution services 24/7 including weekends and holidays on call, emails and WhatsApp whilst ensuring that customer needs are met amicably, promptly and professionally.  The back office team works hand in hand with management in maintaining the standard and etiquette of our brand.

Kelly Kamala

Chief Executive Officer

A vibrant woman owner of a fast growing travel solutions brand business and CEO handling high yield sales and corporate travel management, consultancy and facilitation leverage for top executives, companies and individuals 24/7 for global destinations. Her main product selling points are DMCC, PCOs, Study Abroad, MICE & Tourism Safaris worldwide.

Daniel Noel

Director

Daniel Noel is an energetic travel champion serving under a vibrant CEO handling high yield sales and corporate travel management, study abroad consultancy and facilitation leverage. He is a Director of a a fast growing travel solutions brand business offering "One-Stop-Shop" products and services not limited to DMCC, PCO, MICE & Tourism Safaris

Severine Kamala

Accoutant

serves as a financial center point ensuring that for credibility that all services rendered are Invoiced and that receipts are issued promptly and correctly as well as timely delivered. By doing so, customers find satisfaction. He is the backbone and very essential to the team.

Pamela Matari

Corporate Travel and Safari Consultant

portrays travel and safaris taste and has vast experience of more than nineteen years handling groups as well as individuals. She has inner born qualities and protocols in managing a file end to end by merging experience and safari phenomena that brings bright memories to the customers we serve. What we offer is a never miss opportunity for every traveler. She is welcoming, charming and works hand-in-hand to ensure heart desires are fulfilled in every trip.

Vacant

Travel Consultant

He/She is Hands-on Consultant that ensures that all travel checklists are maintained and monitored end-to-end 24/7 for both DMCC corporate and individual customers.  She ensures that the traveler has all travel advisories and offers regular travel updates whilst improvising business maintenance and revenue generation in selling travel products and services. 

PARTNERS & AFFILIATIONS

About US

K.K. Travel Solutions is a woman owned sole proprietorship business that is fast growing with a unique brand for corporate travel solutions showcasing best buy competitive and comprehensive pricing options.

We are specialized in assisting big, and successful corporations in bringing critical services outside of the company wall, thus increasing their efficiency, significantly reducing costs, improve deliverable quality and managing risk. We provide online solutions of a blend of advanced skills, professional and international expertise.
